prompt: Preserve this exact studio worktable scene and its warm honey daylight grade, lived-in working details, and the small blue-and-white floral printed cotton. Real candid photograph of a working dressmaking atelier, 35mm film look, gentle grain, shallow depth of field, authentic imperfection. No text, no logos, no watermarks. Portrait framing. Add: several rolled cotton fabric bolts leaned upright against the wall just beside the worktable, a quiet 'new stock just came in' feel, a couple still partly wrapped in brown paper, the floral printed cotton visible among plain natural cotton bolts.
